nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr was born in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain and Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain. She had at least 1 son with Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyrはイギリスウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアナナウ ハルでIorwerth ap Peredur ap EdnowainとMrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowainの娘として生まれた。彼女はMeurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannauとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr(은)는 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르 나나 홀에서 Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
